jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at 99acres
jsonLd.description:
Join the 99acres family as a Software Engineer in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!
